name: slack-integration
description: Slack integration for sending messages, managing channels, and automating notifications from Claude Code workflows.
author: marcbrough-bit

send-message.name: Send Message
send-message.description: Send messages to Slack channels or users with rich formatting and attachments.

manage-channels.name: Manage Channels
manage-channels.description: Create, archive, and configure Slack channels for team workflows.

notifications.name: Notifications
notifications.description: Configure automated notifications for build status, deployments, and workflow events.
